title: MxSxC1 Purple Foliage
description:
Change Green Foliage To Purple.
That Simple! Purple Grass, Purple Trees, etc...
body:
**Pack Purpose**
This pack simply replaces foliage colours changing them from Green to Purple.

The colours have been tweaked for specific scenes in "The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow" and are seen in multiple screenshots and videos.

It will replace green grass, or trees, etc...with purple.

Enough people asked for this decided to make a pack for it, but it does nothing more exciting, and needs to be combined with other packs to give the full effects seen in some videos.

But this is the most basic colour settings people asked for!

Thank you all for your input, comments, and requests.

**Instructions**
**Steps To Install & Update**

Drop the folder "mxsxc1_foliage" in the resource pack folder. For example:
```
C:\Users\[UserName]\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks\mxsxc1_foliage
```
**External Links:**

[Miscreat Website](https://www.miscreat.co.uk/ 'miscreat.co.uk')

[GitHub](https://github.com/MxSxC1/mxsxc1purplefoliage)

We do not create mods, we create packs and data packs within Mojang framework, and which will work on Realms.

Never install any packs, mods, or anything without fully understanding what they do, and ensuring it's legitimate and safe! If anything requires elevation (which ours do not), think twice and verify!

The Dark Is A Cold Lonely Shadow
